location: On a corpse atop a rampart tower south of Oridys's Rise in Weeping Peninsula, reached from the Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace by summoning Torrent and using a nearby spiritspring to leap onto the tower's roof.

source.name: Corpse atop rampart tower near Castle Morne

tactics: From the Castle Morne Rampart grace, summon Torrent and look east for the spiritspring, then jump it to reach the tower roof.
No enemy directly guards the corpse, but ranged soldiers on the surrounding rampart can knock you off balance mid-jump if you linger in the open.
lore: Shaped from a great turtle's shell, its natural curve well-suited to deflecting blows. The turtle is a symbol of tireless endurance, and the shield is said to speed stamina recovery in kind.

builds.name: Stamina-sustain tank
builds.why: Unique +3/sec stamina regeneration passive (works even while two-handing another weapon), ideal for a heavy-swinging Strength build that wants to keep attacking without running out of stamina.
